rationale: The matched evidence is only a single DOI reference entry (no in-text citation context or reference text), so there is limited direct evidence of how the 2010 paper is used. Although the cited study is about BRiC (category-level brand importance) and the citing study is about longitudinal stability of consumer traits, there is plausible overlap via brand-related constructs and prior stability evidence, so it cannot be safely treated as an obvious incidental mention.
